q: Is there anything you don't like about your studies?
examiner_note:
Đây là câu hỏi khai thác quan điểm trái chiều. Đừng lo lắng về việc nói điều tiêu cực, giám khảo quan tâm đến cách bạn diễn đạt nó. 
- **Hướng dẫn trả lời**: Bạn có thể phàn nàn về khối lượng bài tập, lịch học dày đặc, các môn lý thuyết khô khan hoặc áp lực thi cử. 
- **Mẹo**: Sử dụng các cụm từ giảm nhẹ sự tiêu cực như 'To be honest', 'To be perfectly frank', 'If I had to pick one thing', 'One drawback is...'.

band7.text: To be honest, I sometimes feel overwhelmed by the heavy workload. We have the lots of assignments and deadlines every week, so I don't have much time for my hobbies or for hanging out with my friends.
band7.note: Trả lời thực tế, sử dụng từ vựng phù hợp ('overwhelmed', 'workload'). Ngữ pháp ổn định.

band8.text: If I had to pick one thing, it would definitely be the monotonous nature of some of the theoretical modules. I find it quite challenging to stay focused when we're just memorizing facts without any immediate practical application.
band8.note: Sử dụng từ vựng nâng cao ('monotonous nature', 'theoretical modules', 'memorizing facts'). Diễn đạt gãy gọn.

band9.text: To be perfectly frank, the most grueling aspect of my studies is the relentless cycle of examinations and assessments. The constant pressure to excel academically can be quite draining at times, leaving very little room for creative exploration beyond the prescribed syllabus.
band9.note: Sử dụng từ vựng cực kỳ ấn tượng ('grueling aspect', 'relentless cycle', 'prescribed syllabus'). Cách diễn đạt 'draining', 'excel academically' rất tự nhiên.

v.example: I felt completely overwhelmed by the amount of work I had to do.

v.meaning: khối lượng công việc nặng nề
v.example: The students complained about the heavy workload during the exam period.
In my free time, I like to hang out with my friends at the park.
Repeating the same tasks every day can be very monotonous.
The course includes several theoretical modules on economic history.
We were expected to memorize long lists of vocabulary.
The surgery brought immediate relief to the patient.
The course focuses on the practical application of the theories we've learned.
To be perfectly frank, I didn't enjoy the lecture at all.
The athletes went through a grueling training program.
Many young professionals are stuck in a relentless cycle of work and sleep.
Students are currently preparing for their final examinations.
Continuous assessment is a fair way to grade student performance.
Her parents always encouraged her to excel academically.
Having to commute for three hours every day is very draining.
The school provides an environment for creative exploration and innovation.

v.meaning: chương trình học được định sẵn
v.example: Teachers must follow the prescribed syllabus for the national exam.
One drawback of living in a big city is the high cost of living.
I stayed up late to finish my history assignment.
The deadline for applications is the end of next week.
Procrastination is a common problem for many students.
Researching for a thesis is an incredibly time-consuming process.
The weeks leading up to finals are always very stressful.
He felt burnt out after working sixty hours a week for a month.
The medicine program is notoriously demanding and rigorous.
Many students find accounting to be a rather dry subject.
The school is moving away from outdated methods of teaching.
The poor performance was blamed on a lack of resources in schools.
Distance learning can sometimes make students feel isolated.
The meeting was unstructured and didn't achieve its goals.
I find it hard to study at home because there are too many distractions.
The teacher has high expectations for all her students.
The university provides counseling for students dealing with academic pressure.
I had to pull an all-nighter to finish my project on time.
Student loans can be a major financial burden after graduation.
I had to cram for my history exam the night before.
Rote learning is not the most effective way to understand complex topics.
The course schedule is unfortunately quite inflexible.
The school has a very competitive atmosphere which can be stressful.
Students often struggle because of a lack of guidance from their tutors.
There is a significant imbalance between theory and practice in the curriculum.
Checking data for errors can be a very tedious task.
The rules at the university are quite restrictive for first-year students.
The public school system in many areas is notoriously underfunded.
We couldn't finish the assignment because of the vague instructions.
I find the professor's comments to be overly critical and discouraging.
A boring class can easily lead to a lack of motivation among students.
Doing laboratory reports can become quite repetitive after a while.
Isolated study without any feedback can be very difficult.
Academic burnout is a serious issue that affects many graduate students.
